name: Michael Maier
biography: A German physician, counselor to Rudolf II Habsburg, and a learned alchemist and Rosicrucian apologist.

name: Jacques de Molay
biography: The 23rd and last Grand Master of the Knights Templar.

name: Christian Rosenkreuz
biography: Legendary founder of the Rosicrucian Order.

name: Paracelsus
biography: Swiss physician, alchemist, and astrologer of the German Renaissance.
